---
title: "Gate"
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# Gate

## bases

```{python}
from qiskit import QuantumCircuit
import numpy as np
circ = QuantumCircuit(1, 1)
circ.h([0]) # h gate
circ.x([0]) # x gate
circ.ry(np.pi/2, 0) # R_x gate, 0 is the position of this gate. 
circ.measure([0], [0])
circ.draw()
```

## extension

### random U

```{python}
from qiskit import QuantumCircuit
from qiskit.circuit.library import UnitaryGate
from qiskit.quantum_info import random_unitary

qc = QuantumCircuit(1)

U = random_unitary(2, seed=123)   # 2 表示单比特 Hilbert space 维度
print(type(U.data))
gate = UnitaryGate(U.data, label="U_rand")

qc.append(gate, [0])

qc.draw()
qc.decompose(reps=1).draw()
```
